alt: Young grizzly bear cub standing in shallow water
caption: Grizzly cubs are born in winter dens and stay with their mother for years.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated grizzly bear cub image with verified species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/38/Grizzly_bear_cub_standing_in_the_water.jpg
